name: Engram Memory
description: Enterprise-grade multi-agent collaborative memory system with five-dimensional ownership, memory type classification, and intelligent auto-capture/recall pipelines

userId.label: User ID
userId.help: Root user ID for scoping memories

defaultOrgId.label: Default Organization ID
defaultOrgId.help: Default org_id for memory operations when not explicitly specified

defaultProjectId.label: Default Project ID
defaultProjectId.help: Default project_id for memory operations when not explicitly specified

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically extract and store memories from conversations after each agent turn

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into agent context before each turn

extractionModel.label: Extraction Model
extractionModel.help: LLM model for memory extraction in auto-capture pipeline. Format: provider/model

embeddingModel.label: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.help: Embedding model for vector search. Format: provider/model

ollamaBaseUrl.label: Ollama Base URL
ollamaBaseUrl.help: Base URL for Ollama API (used for both extraction and embedding when using Ollama models)

searchThreshold.label: Search Threshold
searchThreshold.help: Minimum similarity score for search results (0-1). Default: 0.5

topK.label: Top K Results
topK.help: Maximum number of memories to retrieve per search
